SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AdminDevice
Represents a device installation that has been explicitly granted or denied administrator access.
AdminEventAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of events, typically for administrative purposes.
AdminEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
Listener interface for handling event-related click actions.
AdminFragment
Fragment for administrative tasks, such as managing all events and users.
AppNavigator
Helper class for handling navigation between top-level fragments and activities.
AuthDeviceService
Service class handling device authentication using Firebase Auth.
EntrantEventService
Service for entrant-side event participation actions such as joining, leaving, and querying the current user's waiting-list status.
Event
Represents an event that entrants may join through the lottery-based waiting list flow.
EventAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of events.
EventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
Listener interface for handling event click actions.
EventDetailsBottomSheet
A bottom sheet dialog that displays the details of a specific event.
EventService
Service class that provides business logic for managing events.
EventsFragment
Fragment that displays a searchable and filterable list of all events.
FirebaseRepository
Repository class responsible for interacting with Firebase Firestore.
GeoPoint
Represents a geographical point with latitude and longitude coordinates.
ImageAsset
Represents an uploaded image resource such as an event poster.
InstallationIdProvider
Utility class that persists a locally generated installation identifier in SharedPreferences.
LauncherActivity
The entry point activity of the application.
MainActivity
The main activity of the application.
ManageEventFragment
Fragment that allows an organizer to manage a single event.
NotificationAudience
Describes the intended audience for a notification record.
NotificationRecord
Represents a notification record in the Helios application.
NotificationsFragment
Fragment that displays notifications for the user.
OrganizeFragment
Fragment that allows organizers to view and manage their events.
OrganizerQrFragment
Fragment that displays the QR code for an event.
OrganizerViewEntrantsFragment
Fragment that allows an organizer to view and manage the list of entrants for an event.
ProfileFragment
Fragment that displays the user's profile information.
ProfileService
Service responsible for profile bootstrap, profile completion, role synchronization, and notification preference updates for the current device user.
ProfileService.BootstrapResult
 
ProfileSetupActivity
Activity for setting up or editing a user profile.
ScanQrFragment
Fragment that provides QR code scanning functionality.
SetupEventFragment
Fragment for creating or editing an event.
UserAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of users, typically for administrative purposes.
UserAdapter.OnUserClickListener
Listener interface for handling user-related click events.
UserProfile
Represents a user profile in the Helios application.
WaitingListEntry
Represents one entrant's state within a single event waiting list.
WaitingListService
Service for organizer-side waiting-list retrieval, update, and removal actions.
WaitingListStatus
Enumeration representing the possible statuses of an entrant in a waiting list.
